introSection: 4 Ring Roller Coaster (Chinese: 四环过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Daguan Park in Xishan, Kunming, Yunnan, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by Over-the-shoulder harnesses.

fullText:
4 Ring Roller Coaster (Chinese: 四环过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Daguan Park in Xishan, Kunming, Yunnan, China.

Yellow track with white supports.

Riders are held in by Over-the-shoulder harnesses.
